{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220423561CB5F05DF6430602A4AB"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559400562983994174","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，喜欢这类型的小，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760062948,"group_id":"7552788742851791897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活其实很简单，过了今天就是明天。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N00QV7gOWRq2AQJHxkM8beHBjbhcdVRt2z0vZwIPK53J","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b85789ed8a2e44588e90dd7cb26ea750~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709560&x-signature=xslWIxVMFPR8TMcPTgjwPqPwe%2B4%3D","user_id":"1918020422220616","user_name":"心若向阳xy"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1918020422220616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7552788742851791897","book_info":{"abstract":"从古至今，蓝星孕育无数生命。
当时间的流失、时间的转移——
当蓝星陷入无休止的天灾浩劫——
地震撕裂着大地
暴雨淹没整个城市
遮天蔽日的变异蝗虫群
极寒的大雪冻结了最后一缕呼吸
.......
（其他，留个悬念，顺序随机）
幸存者称这场灾难为【地球刷新日】
物竞天择，适者生存！
人类虽然渺小，但他们不会放弃.....
——前世，简爷爷和简奶奶为了寻找简秋，在中途死去，而简秋也在寻找的路上意外死去。
重生后,简秋决定早早辞职，回家陪伴为他操心的家人。
简秋发誓，他一定会保护好自己的家人。
比上辈子更早拥有空间的他，肯定要提前储存物资，好让他们家能安稳度过即将要到来的灾难。
没想到，在简秋回家没几天，年少时期时，多久不见的邻居也回来了，也没想到还会迎来一个小宝宝......
Cp：简秋x贺舟
1.年下1v1 HE 甜文双洁，平行架空。
2.内心超强占有欲漂亮美人受x外表冷酷不近人情内心爱撒娇攻
3.偏日常偏日常偏日常！重要的事情说三遍！
4.吃好、喝好、生活好！不要说去拯救世界、说有空间去做大好人什么的，本文主打一个自己活好，家人平安。
5.第一次写文，请多指教。弃文不必告知QAQ","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/34e0c5c02269265ee1faeeee74010320~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"琳家小妹","author_id":"","book_id":"7552788742851791897","book_name":"天灾之地球重启日","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#585860","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7552880819266650649","read_count":"355","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"315714"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"140","tags":"双男主,纯爱,现代,重生,末世,双洁,空间,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7ffe00023000eb4dabf15081805f03d5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308636&x-signature=UQ5%2BsQBvixThrvfruyDh58i75KU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98103845036","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"l
